description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form factor and rounded corners. The front features a large, edge-to-edge display with minimal bezels, showing a vibrant wallpaper of a starry night sky with silhouetted tree branches, along with standard Android interface elements such as the time, weather widget, and navigation bar. The back is a solid dark blue color with a slightly raised, oval-shaped camera module located at the top left corner, and a small, centered brand logo beneath it. The sides are extremely thin, emphasizing the device's slim profile, and no physical buttons are visible along the edges. The materials appear to be a combination of glass for the front, metal or high-quality plastic for the frame, and possibly some internal electronic components. The overall design is minimalist and contemporary, suitable for everyday urban use.
description: A slim, modern smartphone with a large edge-to-edge display, dark blue back, and a single raised camera module in the top left corner. The front shows a vivid starry wallpaper and Android interface elements.
description_view_0: The back view shows a dark blue surface with a raised oval camera module in the top left and a centered brand logo.
description_view_1: The left edge view highlights the phone's extremely thin profile and the slight protrusion of the camera module.
description_view_2: The front view displays the large, bezel-less screen with a starry night wallpaper and Android interface elements.
description_view_3: The right edge view again emphasizes the slimness of the device and the camera bump.
attribute_brand_logo: A small, white logo reading 'DIBTECH' is centered on the back of the device, below the camera module.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a vivid wallpaper of a starry night sky with tree branches, the time (11:23), a weather widget, and standard Android navigation and app icons.
attribute_camera_placement: A single, oval-shaped camera module is located at the top left corner on the back, slightly raised from the surface.
